articles.title: HONG KONG EXPANDS CRYPTO RULES TO ALLOW MARGIN TRADING AND PERPS
articles.summary: Hong Kong's Securities and Futures Commission has presented a new framework that allows licensed platforms to offer crypto perpetual contracts to professional investors and enables brokers to provide margin financing using assets like bitcoin and ether as collateral, subject to strict risk controls. The move aims to deepen liquidity, improve price discovery, and better integrate traditional finance with digital assets, signaling Hong Kong's continued push to position itself as a regulated global crypto hub focused on market quality over rapid expansion.

articles.title: MALAYSIA TO LAUNCH THREE STABLECOIN AND TOKENIZED DEPOSIT PILOTS IN 2026
articles.summary: Bank Negara Malaysia's (BNM) Digital Asset Innovation Hub is onboarding three 2026 pilots: a ringgit stablecoin settlement led by Standard Chartered Bank Malaysia and Capital A and two tokenized deposit payment projects led by Maybank and CIMB focused on wholesale domestic and cross-border payments so BNM can assess monetary and financial stability, potentially integrate findings with its wholesale CBDC work, and issue guidance on ringgit stablecoins and tokenized deposits by end-2026.

articles.title: ZERO: THE DECENTRALIZED MULTI-CORE WORLD COMPUTER
STRIPE LAUNCHING MACHINE PAYMENTS VIA X402
articles.summary: Stripe is launching a preview of machine payments to help AI agents interact without using virtual cards, which do not have the microtransaction or speed capabilities required at scale. Stripe's PaymentIntents API allows agents to charge for APIs, MCPs, or HTTP requests. It is launching with support for x402 on Base using USDC, with other networks and payment methods coming soon.

articles.title: THE 7 AXES OF PREDICTION MARKETS
articles.summary: There are seven key differentiation axes for prediction markets: product quality, asset variety, capital efficiency, oracles, liquidity provision, regulatory compliance, and strategic positioning. Interesting architectures include yield-bearing collateral implementations and hybrid human/AI oracle systems addressing systemic reliability weaknesses in current resolution mechanisms. Kalshi's US regulatory positioning has enabled embedded distribution through Robinhood and Coinbase, representing a significant competitive moat, while there are emerging choices between horizontal infrastructure plays versus vertically integrated approaches.

articles.title: THE PROBLEM WITH CRYPTO ISN'T CRYPTO
articles.summary: Crypto's current negative public perception – comparable to post-FTX levels despite pro-crypto political winds – stems from broader economic anxiety rather than industry-specific failures, particularly AI-driven job displacement fears that make any financial speculation messaging toxic to mainstream audiences. Recent controversies, including Trump family token launches, Epstein-Bitcoin conspiracy theories, and prediction market culture wars, have compounded this "vibecession" where technological progress remains invisible beneath negative sentiment. The Coinbase Super Bowl ad backlash exemplifies how crypto messaging fails to resonate even with lighthearted content during periods of general financial anxiety.

articles.title: PAYMENTS GIANTS BUILD AGENT RAILS; BUT THEY'RE WALLED GARDENS
articles.summary: Visa, Mastercard, OpenAI+Stripe, Google, Amazon, and PayPal have all launched centralized, permissioned agent payment systems for delegated shopping. However, the rails are siloed as they require Visa tokens, Mastercard credentials, and Stripe flows. They work for human checkout and break down for agent-to-agent use cases like paying compute, API access, or realtime data fees. The real unlock is permissionless, programmable machine-to-machine rails.

articles.title: JOLT: THE ZKVM POWERING ZERO
articles.summary: Jolt is the open-source RISC-V zkVM powering LayerZero's Zero chain, which replaces decades-old PCP-based SNARK approaches with sum-check protocol-based interactive proofs for fundamental efficiency gains. The design allows developers to prove existing programs without code changes or specialized circuits, with each instruction specified in approximately 10 lines of Rust. LayerZero's production implementation (Jolt Pro) achieves 1.61GHz per cell on CUDA GPUs with a roadmap to 4GHz by 2027, with a planned migration to lattice-based cryptography for post-quantum security.

articles.title: WHAT FTX'S INVESTMENTS WOULD BE WORTH TODAY
articles.summary: The FTX bankruptcy estate sold venture stakes like Anthropic and Solana for $3.2 billion, missing $30.3 billion in subsequent market gains.

articles.title: STRIPE ADDS X402 INTEGRATION FOR USDC AGENT PAYMENTS ON BASE
articles.summary: Stripe launched x402-based USDC agent payments on Base as CoinGecko enabled $0.01 pay-per-request crypto data access.

articles.title: TOKENIZATION IS NASCENT, BUT NEEDS MORE USE CASES
articles.summary: Industry leaders from Securitize and Ondo discuss bridging the gap between tokenization hype and utility.

articles.title: ETHEREUM COMMANDS MAJORITY OF TOKENIZED ASSET MARKET
articles.summary: Ethereum now hosts 61.2% of all tokenized assets.
